task.name: Kratos Framework Validation
task.objective: Scan all KRATOS framework files for consistency, broken references, and missing components

critical.mandate: Report ALL issues found — do not stop at first error
Check every path reference in every file
Verify config resolution chain works end-to-end

step.title: File Inventory
step.action: Scan _kratos/ directory tree, count all files by type (.md, .xml, .yaml, .csv)
Compare against expected counts from GT-AI-PLAN.md

step.title: Workflow Integrity
step.action: For each workflow.yaml: verify instructions and validation files exist
Verify config_source files exist
Check for unresolved {variable} references

step.title: Agent Integrity
step.action: For each agent .md file: verify XML is well-formed
Verify each menu item path references a real file
Verify activation steps are numbered correctly

step.title: Command Integrity
step.action: For each .claude/commands/kratos-*.md file: verify it references real framework files
Cross-reference kratos-help.csv — every help entry should have a matching command

step.title: Manifest Integrity
step.action: Verify agent-manifest.csv has rows for all agent files found on disk
Verify workflow-manifest.csv has rows for all workflow.yaml files found
Verify task-manifest.csv has rows for all task files found
Verify skill-manifest.csv has rows for all skill files found

step.title: Config Resolution
step.action: Load global.yaml and each module config.yaml — verify they parse correctly
Resolve one workflow.yaml end-to-end to verify the resolution chain
Verify .resolved/ configs match expected values

step.title: Skill Index Integrity
step.action: For each entry in _skill-index.yaml: verify file exists and line ranges are valid
Verify section content at declared line ranges matches section headers

step.title: Knowledge Index Integrity
step.action: For each entry in knowledge _index.csv files: verify fragment file exists
Verify each fragment is under 200 lines

step.title: Markdown Size Compliance
step.action: Scan all framework markdown files (.md)
Verify every markdown file is at or under 1000 lines
If any markdown file exceeds 1000 lines, report it as a validation failure and recommend sharding via shard-doc

step.title: Report
step.action: Generate framework validation report
Format: PASS/FAIL overall + itemized findings
Group by: critical (broken references), warning (missing optional), info (suggestions)

output.format: Markdown report with PASS/FAIL status and itemized findings
